stalePhrases.pattern: reason to fail or hold a draft\.
stalePhrases.reason: the absolute 'confidence tier never fails a draft' rule — narrowed in 1.5.0 (D2): the project's own commissioned evidence standard IS enforced at the gate; the tier stays advisory only for what the standard doesn't name

stalePhrases.pattern: Record the waiver in the audit report and in the gate-log row.s Detail column, and insert
stalePhrases.reason: waiver recording bundled into the promotion path — superseded post-iteration-1 (red golden adv-audience-standard-waiver): a waiver is recorded the moment it is granted, on the turn it arrives, even with no audit running. See 'Waiver Arriving Between Audits'.

stalePhrases.pattern: Independence is determined solely by the
stalePhrases.reason: independence read off origin_chain alone — superseded in 1.5.0 (F9): origin_chain establishes independence only when it affirmatively identifies DISTINCT origins; 'Origin unclear' is unknown, never independent

stalePhrases.pattern: Two sources that\b[^.]*still two independent sources
stalePhrases.reason: independence inferred from mere agreement, with no clear-and-distinct-origin qualifier — superseded in 1.5.0 (F9). The surviving sentence must read 'Two sources WITH clear, distinct origins ...'; the unqualified form resurrects false convergence.

stalePhrases.pattern: no counter-evidence found for \[research type\](?!, and no adverse search)
stalePhrases.reason: counter-evidence gate as an unconditional block — superseded in 1.5.0 (F7 valve): a documented adverse search plus user acknowledgment is an honest second exit. 'Named, searched, none found' is a legitimate recorded outcome.

stalePhrases.pattern: saturation percentage: confirmatory / total findings(?!, counted per independent cluster)
stalePhrases.reason: saturation counted over raw repeats — superseded in 1.5.0 (pass-2 F9): the ratio is computed per independent cluster, so one file cannot say 'Echo — one data point' and '100% confirmatory' about the same sources

user_override set by the resolution keyword — superseded in 1.5.0 (pass-2 F6): the flag is DERIVED from suggested_resolution vs user_resolution differing. A `confirm: side-A` against a side-B assessment is an override and carries no keyword.

stalePhrases.pattern: STATE\.md missing required frontmatter|hooks\.PreToolUse and hooks\.PreCompact|matcher: "Write"
stalePhrases.reason: progress health-check reading a deployment the plugin never ships (.claude/settings.json separate Write/Edit matchers; STATE.md YAML frontmatter) — fixed in 1.5.0; the checks read the plugin's hooks.json combined matcher and STATE.md's real sections. Resurrecting these fails every real project.

markers: every note to a declared source
every note to a declared source
every note to a declared source
every note to a declared source

contracts.reason: the promotion authorization row is written by audit-claims, its table is created by init, and the PreToolUse hook reads it to authorize writes to outputs/ — all three sides must keep the same file
D2: init compiles the commissioned standard, audit-claims enforces it at the gate — a standard nothing reads is theater
the waiver format init promises the user in their own evidence standard must be the format audit-claims accepts and records
F3 record-never-restrict: discover writes every declined candidate with a verbatim reason; check-gaps and cross-ref read the ledger so a curated evidence base says so

F7 valve: summarize-section writes the adverse-search record and stamps the output; audit-claims verifies the record exists behind the stamp. A stamp with no record is an unsupported claim about the research process itself.
the agent's private prep queue is created at init, written at phase close and by cross-ref's cluster heuristics, and worked through silently by start-phase — a queue nothing reads is a dead file

pass-2 F6: cross-ref records suggested_resolution + user_resolution; synthesis and audit DERIVE the override by comparing the fields. If any side reverts to trusting the boolean, `confirm: side-A` against a side-B assessment launders an override into the deliverable.
pass-2 F5/F7 seam: summarize-section writes the section, audit-claims gates on it structurally (step 5b). A section required of the writer but unchecked by the audit is decoration.

D1 register port: the doctrine ships as a reference file, init's CLAUDE.md template points at it, and EVERY skill that composes a user-facing turn points at it from its Output section. Iteration-3 proved why: when the doctrine was reachable only from audit-claims' phase debrief — which runs solely on the PASS branch — Register scored 0 in 15 of 23 runs. A doctrine one skill reads is a doctrine the other skills violate.

F9: process-source writes 'Origin unclear' into the note rather than omitting the field; cross-ref and check-gaps must both treat it as independence-UNKNOWN (no corroboration credit), and the coverage guide defines it. Drop the token on any side and unknown silently reads as independent.
